mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_SEQ, B.USER_SEQ, B.CATEGORY, B.TITLE, B.CONTENT, B.IS_SECRET, B.VIEW_COUNT, U.NICKNAME AS AUTHOR, DATE_FORMAT(B.CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_BOARD B JOIN TB_USER U ON B.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ
AND B.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND B.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND U.NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND B.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.CATEGORY = 'notice' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, B.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_SEQ, B.USER_SEQ, B.CATEGORY, B.TITLE, B.CONTENT, B.IS_SECRET, B.VIEW_COUNT, U.NICKNAME AS AUTHOR, DATE_FORMAT(B.CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_BOARD B JOIN TB_USER U ON B.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ WHERE B.BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (USER_SEQ, CATEGORY, TITLE, CONTENT) VALUES (#{userSeq}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content})
